subject: Денис, we hid something in your inbox 🐰
body:
The Easter Egg Hunt starts now

Easter Egg Hunt (https://learn.educative.io/e3t/Ctc/RG+113/cz5H404/VWkFSB9j4R_GW62HTJv3-Z7lLW2dmkKk5Mttm2N6hnpq63prCCW8wLKSR6lZ3nYW7M0GyX6R3JH5W1Sdc_L8lBy5xN34bPGtwtkjVVTGWnD6_CMFFW795CYQ8tYnZ9W7Fh4b63T5McQW1kx9-n5dyf2pW63jYpz5s7cZGW7S3rHm4dXwFtW8VX6XX6GWN_LW2ZRbnS5nJ17tW6DWkxW1P4qCkW1PgVKj3wRMgcW2cf_Nd2rT0YHW20WBwZ6HsShVVxhbRX4Xy1hbW5XcQ6844Xh_QW4YyH6-5lc17yW2dF6GX75F318W4-nRpR2vCv7CW4DmKP25w5X3GN7vTmZmxJ-r2W2qV7cr2-KtFbW3n3vlf8mS7L0W6fKSR_3xjxdkN8YbbfJH_TYTW3TmXgB8rsbvMN11SMgpqWFp4f6GZwn404 )

Happy April, Денис!

For the third year running, April is gearing up to be our biggest month for AI learning. And this year, we’re kicking things off with a little Easter egg hunt 🐣.

Just crack open your Easter egg here (https://learn.educative.io/e3t/Ctc/RG+113/cz5H404/VWkFSB9j4R_GW62HTJv3-Z7lLW2dmkKk5Mttm2N6hnpq63prCCW8wLKSR6lZ3nYW7M0GyX6R3JH5W1Sdc_L8lBy5xN34bPGtwtkjVVTGWnD6_CMFFW795CYQ8tYnZ9W7Fh4b63T5McQW1kx9-n5dyf2pW63jYpz5s7cZGW7S3rHm4dXwFtW8VX6XX6GWN_LW2ZRbnS5nJ17tW6DWkxW1P4qCkW1PgVKj3wRMgcW2cf_Nd2rT0YHW20WBwZ6HsShVVxhbRX4Xy1hbW5XcQ6844Xh_QW4YyH6-5lc17yW2dF6GX75F318W4-nRpR2vCv7CW4DmKP25w5X3GN7vTmZmxJ-r2W2qV7cr2-KtFbW3n3vlf8mS7L0W6fKSR_3xjxdkN8YbbfJH_TYTW3TmXgB8rsbvMN11SMgpqWFp4f6GZwn404 ) to compete in a series of fun new challenges — and a chance to win some serious prizes.

Match the eggs, solve 3 code puzzles, and unlock your tier:

Your Prizes

5 stars → 10% extra off

4 stars → 5% extra off

3 stars → 3% extra off

The better you score, the more you save on our most in-demand content:

› Grokking the AI/ML Coding Interview

› Building LLM-Powered Applications

› Grokking System Design

› Mastering Agentic AI Patterns

But these eggs won’t last long: the Easter codes disappear by Monday. So grab yours now before they’re all dried up.

Start the Easter Egg Hunt → (https://learn.educative.io/e3t/Ctc/RG+113/cz5H404/VWkFSB9j4R_GW62HTJv3-Z7lLW2dmkKk5Mttm2N6hnpq63prCCW8wLKSR6lZ3nYW7M0GyX6R3JH5W1Sdc_L8lBy5xN34bPGtwtkjVVTGWnD6_CMFFW795CYQ8tYnZ9W7Fh4b63T5McQW1kx9-n5dyf2pW63jYpz5s7cZGW7S3rHm4dXwFtW8VX6XX6GWN_LW2ZRbnS5nJ17tW6DWkxW1P4qCkW1PgVKj3wRMgcW2cf_Nd2rT0YHW20WBwZ6HsShVVxhbRX4Xy1hbW5XcQ6844Xh_QW4YyH6-5lc17yW2dF6GX75F318W4-nRpR2vCv7CW4DmKP25w5X3GN7vTmZmxJ-r2W2qV7cr2-KtFbW3n3vlf8mS7L0W6fKSR_3xjxdkN8YbbfJH_TYTW3TmXgB8rsbvMN11SMgpqWFp4f6GZwn404 )
